reviews.author: Nitin Tyagi
reviews.review_body: Really good atmosphere for kids. Individual attention on each kid . Teachers are well qualified and supportive. Each aspect of development is taken care by the school. Fun base learning n skill base learning is included in the study. Overall a good experience

reviews.author: manisha naagar
reviews.review_body: This school is wonderful. School admin are involved in everything and striving to improve learning opportunities for students, offer great programs and events for the kids and hire great teachers. Teachers are hardworking and dedicated to our children. Year after year we have been so pleased with the most caring and wonderful teachers

reviews.author: Arisha Tyagi
reviews.review_body: RPS International School is a great place for learning. The teachers are very hardworking and supportive towards children. The school gives equal importance to both academics and extra curricular activities. A great environment is provided by the school. I am extremely impressed with how the school has adjusted the education system with the new "normal". The mentors are incredible, classes are very interactive ensuring the kids are engaged. Academics and extra curriculars both are important and RPS gives enough opportunities to learn and grow in both the fields.

reviews.author: RENU w2299
reviews.review_body: Really good environment for kids. School uses creative ways and new teaching methods to take up the concepts and focus on the holistic development of the child. Teachers are focussed and talented

reviews.author: SPARK SIDE
reviews.review_body: Well organised staff, caring teachers, focus on latest learnings , activities are according to students to encourage them, overall great experience because they focus on students grooming skills , the first priority are kids , so glad that my son is studying in Rps international school greater noida 👍🏻
